snippet.title: THE EDGE OF SEVENTEEN Red Band Trailer (2016)
snippet.description:
Official "The Edge of Seventeen" Movie Trailer 2016 | Subscribe ➤ https://abo.yt/kc | Hailee Steinfeld Movie #Trailer | Release: 30 Sep 2016 | https://KinoCheck.com/movie/87n/the-edge-of-seventeen-2016?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description
Everyone knows that growing up is hard, and life is no easier for high school junior Nadine (Hailee Steinfeld), who is already at peak awkwardness when her all-star older brother Darian (Blake Jenner) starts dating her best friend Krista (Haley Lu Richardson). All at once, Nadine feels more alone than ever, until the unexpected friendship of a thoughtful boy (Hayden Szeto) gives her a glimmer of hope that things just might not be so terrible after all. The film also stars Kyra Sedgwick as Nadine’s well-meaning but completely ineffective mother, and Woody Harrelson as Nadine’s History teacher, mentor and reluctant sounding board.

Endcard videos
ROGUE ONE: Star Wars Trailer ➤ https://youtu.be/dC3ehZ9cy_s
WHY HIM Red Band Trailer (2016) ➤ https://youtu.be/v4-s9i6ydS4
THE DIVISION GameCheck Trailer ➤ https://youtu.be/Ym-jdbqttnc

#EdgeofSeventeen is a new movie by Kelly Fremon, starring Hailee Steinfeld, Woody Harrelson and Blake Jenner.

Our gaming-channel ➤ https://youtube.com/Spiele
